news.headline: Pope Leo exalts first American saint as a model for Christians for her care of migrants
news.summary:
Pope Leo on Saturday exalted the first American saint, Mother Frances Cabrini, as a model for Christians today to care for migrants in need, as he visited her birthplace during a day trip to northern Italy.

news.headline: Brilliant Kapp leads South Africa past India
news.summary: Marizanne Kapp strikes a powerful 81 as South Africa beat India by six wickets to keep their World Cup hopes alive.

news.headline: Father and Uncle of Slain New York Girl Given Life Sentences in Pakistan
news.summary: The killing of the victim, a 14-year-old girl from Yonkers who was known for posting videos on TikTok, was premeditated, a court ruled.
